channel.title: April Kidd's Blog
channel.description: Thoughts, project updates, and rants from April herself

item.title: My First Post
item.description:
This is my first post!

Welcome to my new blog. I'm excited to share my thoughts and projects with you. Most of the content on this blog will be me ranting about things I find cool, or little projects I've made that I want to share with my small corner of the internet. If you're expecting anything coherent, you're in the wrong place.
